normalized_cells: SEPA Direct Debit Return or Refund Fee
This fee is charged when a refund request is made or a return is requested or a direct debit transaction is rejected or reversed.
PayPal shall charge a Fee in an amount equal to the amount billed to PayPal by the institution at which you hold your account.

normalized_cells: Bank Return on Withdrawal/Transfer out of PayPal

normalized_cells: Credit Card and Debit Card Confirmation(s)

See Credit Card and Debit Card Link and Confirmation Table below.
